properties.name: hotkey.annotation.enabled
properties.description: Enable @HotKey annotation AOP support.

properties.name: hotkey.instance-id
properties.description: Explicit instance ID for queue naming. Falls back to <server.port>-<HOSTNAME> (or <server.port>-<UUID> if HOSTNAME is unset) if empty.

properties.name: hotkey.scheduling.enabled
properties.description: Enable periodic TopK decay and expelled-key drain scheduling.

properties.name: hotkey.report.enabled
properties.description: Enable app-to-Worker report aggregation and publishing via AMQP.

properties.name: hotkey.local.top-k
properties.description: HeavyKeeper top-K capacity (maximum number of tracked hot keys).

properties.name: hotkey.local.width
properties.description: HeavyKeeper sketch width (number of columns in the Count-Min Sketch matrix).

properties.name: hotkey.local.depth
properties.description: HeavyKeeper sketch depth (number of hash rows).

properties.name: hotkey.local.decay
properties.description: HeavyKeeper decay factor applied during periodic decay.

properties.name: hotkey.local.min-count
properties.description: Minimum frequency count before a key is considered for the top-K ranking.

properties.name: hotkey.local.local-cache-max-size
properties.description: Maximum size of the L1 Caffeine cache (number of entries).

properties.name: hotkey.local.local-cache-ttl-minutes
properties.description: Time-to-live in minutes for L1 cache entries (hard expiry).

properties.name: hotkey.local.inflight-max-size
properties.description: Maximum number of in-flight (pending) SingleFlight requests.

properties.name: hotkey.local.inflight-ttl-seconds
properties.description: Time-to-live in seconds for in-flight SingleFlight entries.

properties.name: hotkey.local.inflight-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Timeout in seconds before an in-flight SingleFlight request is considered failed.

properties.name: hotkey.local.executor-core-pool-size
properties.description: Core pool size for the async cache-loading executor.

properties.name: hotkey.local.executor-max-pool-size
properties.description: Maximum pool size for the async cache-loading executor.

properties.name: hotkey.local.executor-queue-capacity
properties.description: Queue capacity for the async cache-loading executor.

properties.name: hotkey.local.scheduler-pool-size
properties.description: Pool size for the shared HotKey scheduler (periodic tasks).

properties.name: hotkey.local.expelled-queue-capacity
properties.description: Capacity of the expelled-key queue (for keys evicted from the top-K ranking).

properties.name: hotkey.local.decay-period
properties.description: Deprecated: decay period in seconds (no longer used).

deprecation.reason: No longer used; decay is driven by HotKeySchedulingConfiguration.

properties.name: hotkey.local.default-hard-ttl-ms
properties.description: Default hard TTL in milliseconds for normal (non-hot) cache entries.

properties.name: hotkey.local.hard-ttl-ms
properties.description: Override hard TTL in milliseconds for normal keys (0 = use default-hard-ttl-ms).

properties.name: hotkey.local.default-hot-hard-ttl-ms
properties.description: Default hard TTL in milliseconds for hot cache entries.

properties.name: hotkey.local.hot-hard-ttl-ms
properties.description: Override hard TTL in milliseconds for hot keys (0 = use default-hot-hard-ttl-ms).

properties.name: hotkey.local.default-soft-ttl-ms
properties.description: Default soft TTL in milliseconds for normal (non-hot) cache entries.

properties.name: hotkey.local.soft-ttl-ms
properties.description: Override soft TTL in milliseconds for normal keys (0 = use default-soft-ttl-ms).

properties.name: hotkey.local.default-hot-soft-ttl-ms
properties.description: Default soft TTL in milliseconds for hot cache entries.

properties.name: hotkey.local.hot-soft-ttl-ms
properties.description: Override soft TTL in milliseconds for hot keys (0 = use default-hot-soft-ttl-ms).

properties.name: hotkey.local.ttl-jitter-enabled
properties.description: Whether to apply random jitter to TTL expiry timestamps to prevent cache stampedes.

properties.name: hotkey.local.ttl-jitter-ratio
properties.description: Jitter ratio (0.0-1.0) applied to TTLs e.g. 0.1 means +/- 10% random offset.

properties.name: hotkey.local.refresh-max-pools
properties.description: Maximum number of async refresh pools for soft-expired cache entries.

properties.name: hotkey.local.version-key-ttl-minutes
properties.description: TTL in minutes for Redis version tracking keys.

properties.name: hotkey.local.app-name
properties.description: Application name used for report routing and queue naming.

properties.name: hotkey.local.report-exchange
properties.description: Name of the DirectExchange for app-to-Worker report messages.

properties.name: hotkey.local.report-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between periodic report flushes.

properties.name: hotkey.local.shard-count
properties.description: Thread count divisor for auto consumer calculation (max(4, availableProcessors/2) when 0).

properties.name: hotkey.local.queue-capacity
properties.description: Capacity of the internal report batch queue.

properties.name: hotkey.local.queue-offer-timeout-ms
properties.description: Timeout in milliseconds for offering a batch to the report queue.

properties.name: hotkey.local.consumer-count
properties.description: Number of report queue consumer threads (0 = auto: max(4, availableProcessors/2)).

properties.name: hotkey.local.consistent-hashing.enabled
properties.description: Enable consistent-hashing mode for report routing to dynamic Worker instances.

properties.name: hotkey.local.consistent-hashing.virtual-nodes
properties.description: Number of virtual nodes per physical Worker in the consistent-hash ring.

properties.name: hotkey.local.instance-id
properties.description: Per-instance identifier for queue naming. Overrides auto-detected instance-id.

properties.name: hotkey.local.reporter.enabled
properties.description: Whether BBR adaptive rate-limiting is enabled for the reporter.

properties.name: hotkey.local.reporter.cpu-threshold
properties.description: CPU threshold (0-1000, default 800 = 80%) for reporter backpressure.

properties.name: hotkey.local.reporter.cpu-poll-interval-ms
properties.description: CPU polling interval in milliseconds for reporter backpressure.

properties.name: hotkey.local.reporter.cpu-decay
properties.description: EMA decay factor for CPU smoothing (0.0-1.0).

properties.name: hotkey.local.reporter.bbr-window-ms
properties.description: BBR sliding window size in milliseconds.

properties.name: hotkey.local.reporter.bbr-window-buckets
properties.description: Number of buckets in the BBR sliding window.

properties.name: hotkey.local.reporter.bbr-cooldown-ms
properties.description: Cooldown period in ms after a reporter drop before allowing again.

properties.name: hotkey.local.heartbeat.exchange-name
properties.description: Heartbeat exchange name for worker liveliness detection.

properties.name: hotkey.local.heartbeat.timeout-ms
properties.description: Heartbeat timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: hotkey.local.heartbeat.verify-interval-ms
properties.description: Verify interval in milliseconds for worker liveliness checks.

properties.name: hotkey.local.heartbeat.ping-timeout-ms
properties.description: PING timeout in milliseconds for worker verification.

properties.name: hotkey.local.heartbeat.degrade-after-failures
properties.description: Number of consecutive heartbeat failures before graceful degradation.

properties.name: hotkey.local.spring-cache.enabled
properties.description: Enable Spring @Cacheable integration with HotKey dynamic TTL.

properties.name: hotkey.local.spring-cache.key-separator
properties.description: Separator between cache name and key in internal cache key string.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.enabled
properties.description: Enable cross-instance cache synchronization (INVALIDATE/REFRESH). Requires Redis.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.exchange-name
properties.description: Name of the FanoutExchange for cache sync messages.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.queue-prefix
properties.description: Prefix for the per-instance sync queue name.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.auto-startup
properties.description: Whether the sync listener container starts automatically.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.dedup-window-seconds
properties.description: Time window in seconds for deduplicating duplicate sync messages.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.dedup-max-size
properties.description: Maximum number of entries in the sync deduplication cache.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.warmup-jitter-ms
properties.description: Maximum random jitter in milliseconds applied to sync listener startup.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.concurrent-consumers
properties.description: Number of concurrent consumers for the sync listener.

properties.name: hotkey.sync.scheduler-pool-size
properties.description: Pool size for the sync scheduler (deferred Redis reads).

properties.name: hotkey.sync.prefetch-count
properties.description: AMQP prefetch count for the sync listener.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.enabled
properties.description: Enable listening for Worker HOT/COOL decisions. Requires Redis.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.exchange-name
properties.description: Name of the FanoutExchange for Worker decision broadcasts. Must match hotkey.worker.messaging.broadcast-exchange.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.queue-prefix
properties.description: Prefix for the per-instance Worker decision queue name.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.auto-startup
properties.description: Whether the Worker listener container starts automatically.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.warmup-jitter-ms
properties.description: Maximum random jitter in milliseconds applied to Worker listener startup.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.concurrent-consumers
properties.description: Number of concurrent consumers for the Worker decision listener.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.scheduler-pool-size
properties.description: Pool size for the Worker listener scheduler (deferred Redis reads).

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.prefetch-count
properties.description: AMQP prefetch count for the Worker listener.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.sre.enabled
properties.description: Enable SRE adaptive rate limiter for HOT decision processing.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.sre.window-ms
properties.description: Sliding window duration in milliseconds for SRE rate limiter tracking.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.sre.buckets
properties.description: Number of time buckets within the SRE rate limiter sliding window.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.sre.min-samples
properties.description: Minimum total samples before SRE rate limiter begins active throttling.

properties.name: hotkey.worker-listener.sre.success-threshold
properties.description: Success ratio threshold (0.0-1.0) for SRE rate limiter backpressure.
